steps.title: Use the x-intercepts
steps.content: The graph passes through $(10,0)$ and $(-4,0)$, so the roots are $10$ and $-4$. Therefore $$f(x)=a(x-10)(x+4)$$

steps.title: Find b in terms of a
Find a possible value
steps.content: Then $$a+b=a-6a=-5a$$ Since $a$ is an integer greater than $1$, $a=2$ is allowed and gives $$a+b=-10$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The correct value is $-10$, so A is correct.
